How does one view superhuman feats of athleticism in an age when doping scandals have made us cynical?

Sign up now:Get ST's newsletters delivered to your inbox

Spectators cheer during the closing ceremony of the Paris 2024 Olympic Games at the Stade de France, in Saint-Denis, on Aug 11, 2024.

PHOTO: AFP

Danson Cheong

PublishedAug 18, 2024, 05:00 AM

UpdatedAug 18, 2024, 05:00 AM

One of the videos I enjoyed watching most this Olympic season is a clip of American swimmer Katie Ledecky luxuriating in the end of a pool.

She had just finished a 1,500m freestyle race20 seconds ahead of her closest rival.

title: As records tumbled at the Paris Olympics, I watched with joy and trepidation | The Straits Times
description: Watching superhuman feats in Paris, the writer's awe was tinged with the question: Is this really true?  Read more at straitstimes.com.
